title: Product-Market Fit Has a Ceiling | Daniel Fox
meta_description: The fit that got you to your first few million covers one segment, one channel, one story. Why product-market fit is a gradient, not a finish line, and how the next fit hides in plain sight.

schema.headline: The product-market fit you found has a ceiling
schema.description: The fit that got you to your first few million covers one segment, one channel, one story. Why product-market fit is a gradient, not a finish line.
